title: anchusa italica var. azurea
intro: Anchusa italica var. azurea, also known as Italian bugloss or azure bugloss, is a perennial plant in the borage family (Boraginaceae) characterized by its vibrant blue flowers and edible leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Anchusa italica var. azurea include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often consumed in moderation due to its potential toxicity in large quantities.
